product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I hope you're doing well. I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I'm really interested in it. I was wondering if there is any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It's a fantastic choice! While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can offer you a special price of $1,500. Let me know if that works for you. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer! Unfortunately, I have a budget of $880 and cannot exceed that. If you can work within that budget, I would be interested.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I appreciate your budget constraints, but I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. If you can consider a price closer to that, I'd be happy to proceed. Let me know your thoughts. Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for considering my budget. Unfortunately, $1,100 is still above my limit. I'll have to pass on this offer. Thank you for your time.
